steps.title: Identify the Temporal Range
steps.content: The strongest clue is that the work “explores contemporary issues while also providing context dating all the way back to the sixteenth century.” This reveals the book encompasses both modern and historical material — a wide time span.

steps.title: Apply the Signal to the Choices
steps.content:
The passage shows the work covers contemporary and historical material spanning centuries — a range clearly worth noting. “Scope” captures this perfectly — it means the extent of coverage.

The other options don't fit: impartiality isn't established, terseness contradicts this temporal breadth, and reputation isn't addressed.

That confirms A is correct.
